title: Dalisor Merchant Fleet
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Dalisor Merchant Fleet''' was an intergalactic shipping conglomerate from the [[Dalisor system/Legends|Dalisor system]]. The fleet was destroyed by the [[Lortan]]s during the [[Reslian Purge]].

{{Company-stub}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-09-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 12: Aliens — Enemies and Allies]]''
